Non-disclosure agreement for project proposals
Preamble
Defined terms
In this agreement, the following definitions shall apply:
Information  which  the  receiving  party  can  show  was  in  its  possession  on  a  non- confidential basis before receipt of the information from the disclosing party;
Information  which  is  lawfully  in  the  public  domain  at  the  time  of  the  receiving  party’s receipt  of  the  information  from  the  disclosing  party,

Protection
Except  as  expressly  permitted  by  this  agreement,
Executed appendix a – permitted recipient’s acknowledgement; or
Are  bound  in  writing  by  confidentiality  terms,
The receiving party shall immediately notify the disclosing party, in writing,
Relationship of the parties
This agreement is not intended to and does not obligate either party:
To disclose any specific confidential information; or
To enter into any subsequent business arrangements regarding the permitted purpose or any other matter.
This agreement does not create any exclusivity between the parties;
No  joint  venture,
Term and return or destruction of confidential information
Subject to section 5.4,
Return  to  the  disclosing  party  or  destroy  all  of  the  disclosing  party’s  original  tangible confidential information,
Subject  to  subsection  5.3(c),

Safeguard  any  electronic  confidential  information  that  cannot  be  destroyed  due  to  the receiving party’s archiving practices or policies with the same degree of care as it would its own confidential information;
Retain  electronic  confidential  information  described  in  subsection  5.
Notwithstanding  anything  in  section  5.3,
Upon request of the disclosing party,
Remedies
Costs and expenses
Each party shall pay its own costs and expenses incurred in connection with this agreement.
Notices

Confidential information.
Receiver’s obligations.  receiver shall:
Additional disclosures.  receiver may disclose confidential information if the same:
Was generally available at the time it was disclosed other than as a result of a disclosure made by receiver;
Was known to the receiver at the time it received such information,
Is disclosed with the prior written approval of vidar;
Becomes known to receiver on a non-confidential basis from a source other than vidar without breach of this agreement by receiver;
Is disclosed to a third party by vidar without restrictions against non-disclosure similar to those contained in this agreement;
Is disclosed pursuant to the order or requirement of a court; administrative agency,
Is hereafter independently developed by receiver without the aid,
Additional receivers.  an employee, director, officer, manager, member,
Intellectual property
Nothing in this agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights,
All intellectual property that are original works of authorship shall be considered works made for hire (as that phrase is used in section 101 of the united states copyright act,
Receiver shall promptly disclose all intellectual property to vidar and shall make and maintain adequate and current written records of all intellectual property.
